name: Observability Stack (Prometheus + Grafana)
description: A pre-configured observability stack containing Prometheus metrics collection and a clean Grafana dashboard.

variables.label: Grafana Dashboard Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the Grafana visual dashboard (avoid 3000, used by the Floci dev server).

variables.label: Prometheus API Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the Prometheus raw metrics console.
